data.title: HKUST Congregation 2025 awards 5 honorary doctorates to distinguished leaders in Hong Kong, Pro-Chancellor Dr. John CHAN present.
data.description: On October 18, 2025, Hong Kong University of Science and Technology (HKUST) conducted Congregation 2025 and granted Honorary Doctorates to five esteemed leaders. Dr. John CHAN Cho-Chak, HKUST Pro-Chancellor, presented the awards at the ceremony. The event marked a significant recognition of outstanding contributions, with a total of five individuals being honored on this occasion.

data.title: Sify Technologies (NASDAQ: SIFY) to report Q2 FY 2025-26 financial results on 25th Oct 2025 before market opens.
data.description: Sify Technologies Limited, a prominent Digital ICT solutions provider in India with global service offerings in Data Center, Cloud, Networks, Security, and Digital services, is set to release its unaudited IFRS financial results for the second quarter concluding on September 30, 2025. The announcement will be made on Saturday, October 25, 2025, before the market opens. Sify Technologies Limited is listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol SIFY.

data.title: A lithium battery fire caused an Air China flight to make an emergency landing. No injuries reported.
data.description: A battery caught fire unexpectedly while placed in a piece of luggage stored in the overhead bin of an aircraft. Fortunately, the airline confirmed that there were zero injuries reported as a result of this incident.

data.title: 13th Annual Energy Day Festival in Houston attracted thousands of students with STEM exhibits, academic awards, and energy education.
data.description: The recent Energy Day Festival held in Houston, now in its 13th year, motivated numerous students by showcasing STEM exhibits, presenting academic awards, and providing valuable real-world energy education opportunities. The event attracted thousands of attendees and emphasized the importance of STEM education and innovation in the energy sector.

data.title: Merck, Pfizer, and Astellas offer hope to bladder cancer patients with aggressive form - Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: Three pharmaceutical giants, Merck, Pfizer, and Astellas Pharma, are providing promising prospects for patients battling a severe type of bladder cancer. This development has sparked enthusiasm in the medical community and is considered a significant step forward in cancer treatment. The collaboration between these companies offers renewed hope for patients, with experts highlighting the immense impact it could have on those affected by the disease. This breakthrough represents a major advancement in the fight against bladder cancer and showcases the potential for innovative treatments to transform patient outcomes.

data.title: Litecoin creator Charlie Lee wishes he didn't create it, instead advises to buy and hold Bitcoin. Creating Litecoin was a "headache."
data.description: The creator of Litecoin, Charlie Lee, discussed the upcoming debut of a Litecoin exchange-traded fund on Wall Street, describing it as a "headache" and expressing regret for pursuing it. During an interview with CoinDesk on Sept. 30, Lee advised his younger self to solely invest in Bitcoin without engaging in any other crypto-related activities. Lee, a former Google employee, admitted that creating Litecoin did not bring him significant profits and was a challenging experience. He expressed admiration for the anonymity of Bitcoin's creator, Satoshi Nakamoto. For more details, refer to Benzinga.com.

data.title: Cupshe launches For the Plot Party Collection with The Secret Lives of Mormon Wives stars Jennifer Affleck, Demi Engemann, and Layla Taylor.
data.description: Los Angeles, on October 18, 2025 - Cupshe, a prominent fashion brand, has introduced its latest collaboration named For the Plot Party Collection. This exclusive collection is a result of their partnership with the famous stars from The Secret Lives of Mormon Wives - Jennifer Affleck, Demi Engemann, and Layla Taylor. The capsule showcases three unique edits and is expected to make a significant impact in the fashion industry.

data.title: AstraZeneca's drug Enhertu may reduce breast cancer surgeries, study at ESMO reveals. Stock in buy zone.
data.description: A study presented at the ESMO conference revealed that AstraZeneca's drug Enhertu has the potential to allow certain breast cancer patients to avoid surgery. This news was announced over the weekend, highlighting the drug's impact on the treatment of breast cancer. Following this development, AstraZeneca's stock entered a prime buying range, showing promising growth prospects in the market.

data.title: Broadway actors secure deal, musicians still threaten strike. Agreement reached between Broadway League and Actors’ Equity Association. Union to ratify.
data.description: A tentative agreement was reached between The Broadway League and Actors’ Equity Association in the early hours of Saturday. The agreement is now awaiting ratification from union members.

data.title: Is Bitcoin poised for a rebound as gold drops? Analysts suggest so. Historic low in Bitcoin-to-gold ratio hints at potential 100-600% price surge.
data.description: The ratio between Bitcoin and gold has recently reached record lows, a trend that has historically signaled significant uptrends in Bitcoin. Previous instances of such lows have been followed by price increases of 100% to 600% in Bitcoin.

data.title: TRX price may reach $0.36 by Nov 2025 despite short-term challenges. Predicted 10-16% rise to $0.34 in 4 weeks from current $0.31.
data.description: Forecasts indicate that TRX could experience a 10-16% increase, reaching prices between $0.34 and $0.36 in the next 4 weeks. However, the current value of TRX at $0.31 is facing a downward trend, signaling the need for careful consideration before investing.

data.title: ENHERTU® followed by THP before surgery resulted in 67% pathologic complete response in phase III trial for HER2-positive breast cancer.
data.description: In a Phase III trial called DESTINY-Breast11, positive outcomes were observed in Wilmington, Del., with the use of ENHERTU® (fam-trastuzumab deruxtecan-nxki) alongside paclitaxel, trastuzumab, and pertuzumab (THP) in the neoadjuvant setting. The study revealed a substantial enhancement in the pathologic complete response (pCR) rate, marked by both statistical significance and clinical importance. The comparison between ENHERTU plus THP and dose-dense doxorubicin/cyclophosphamide plus THP (ddAC-THP) in patients yielded promising results.

data.title: Litecoin aims for $98-$101 rebound by November 2025 amid bearish pressure. Key support at $87-$90.
data.description: The Litecoin outlook indicates a possible bounce back to a range of $98 to $101 despite the prevailing downward trend, while the crucial support level at $87 to $90 will play a significant role in determining the future direction of LTC.

data.title: 6th International Ancient Capitals Forum began in Luoyang with 150+ attendees focusing on sustainable development.
data.description: In Luoyang, China, the 6th International Ancient Capitals Forum commenced on October 17th, 2025. Over 150 attendees, comprising government officials, experts, scholars, and representatives from international organizations, participated in the event held in Henan Province.

data.title: ATOM may hit $4.35 resistance in 30 days based on technical analysis, indicating potential recovery from oversold conditions.
data.description: Analysts predict that the price of ATOM is likely to recover to the $4.35 resistance level despite the current bearish trend. This is supported by oversold conditions and targets set by analysts, indicating potential upside.

data.title: DeFi faces challenges with on-chain circuit breakers amid historic volatility. Crypto prices plunged, experts skeptical of Wall Street solutions.
data.description: Last week, the prices of cryptocurrencies experienced a significant drop, with historic levels of volatility driven by liquidations. Analysts noted that the safety mechanisms in place on Wall Street would not have been effective in preventing the downturn.

data.title: Express Wash Concepts to hire 450 team members across 6 states in Q4, offering competitive pay and clear career paths.
data.description: Express Wash Concepts (EWC), a rapidly expanding express car wash operator, is looking to recruit 450 new team members in six states. The company, headquartered in Columbus, Ohio, is offering competitive salaries, profit sharing opportunities, and defined career advancement routes to attract top talent. This initiative marks a significant step in EWC's aggressive growth strategy.

data.title: BCH price set to hit $525-$540 in a week, despite oversold conditions at $467. Bulls may dominate soon.
data.description: Analysts are projecting a potential rebound in the price of BCH, with predictions indicating a climb to the $525-$540 range from the current levels of $467. The oversold Relative Strength Index (RSI) and consensus among analysts are pointing towards a short-term bounce in the near future.

data.title: Chainlink is expected to hit $21.50 despite short-term bearish pressure, with analysts predicting a range of $17.78-$25.41. Technical analysis hints at a bounce from $16.70 support to $21.57 target.
data.description: Analysts have provided a varied forecast for the price of LINK, ranging from $17.78 to $25.41. Technical analysis indicates the possibility of a rebound from the $16.70 support level, with a medium-term target set at $21.57.

data.title: Cryptocurrency market in turmoil; Binance offers bailout, JP Morgan plans crypto service, corps accumulating BTC, Elon Musk endorses.
data.description: The cryptocurrency markets are in turmoil following a significant crash. Binance has committed to providing assistance during this challenging time. JP Morgan has announced plans to enter the cryptocurrency space by offering services related to digital assets. Meanwhile, there is a growing trend among corporations to accumulate Bitcoin, with Elon Musk voicing his support for the leading cryptocurrency. These developments come as Bitcoin's value dropped by over 10% in the past 24 hours, reaching a low of $30,000.
